re.help_404:
Reddit help file not found, someone likely deleted it.
    Hint: You can find the official help text at https://github.com/ByteDice/ByteDiceAssistant in `re_help.md`.
**CAUTION:** The official help file may contain incorrect information if you're not using the official bot by Byte Dice.
